svg.title: Drone Designer Component Selection Pipeline Flowchart
svg.desc: Full 10-stage pipeline from user input through propeller, motor, ESC, energy model, battery selection, to display results, with an optional optimizer loop.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about Stage 1 user inputs in the drone designer pipeline')
sendPrompt('Explain Stage 2: validation and ISA air density calculation')
g.text: Validate specs · ISA air density ρ

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Stage 3 propeller candidate selection work using physics?')
g.text: Thrust → n, P, Q per prop
RPM check · KV table per cell count

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does motor selection work in Stage 4 using torque gate and KV scoring?')
g.text: Rank by torque, KV, efficiency, mass

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain ESC selection logic in Stage 5')
g.text: Filter by current margin · smallest sufficient

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the mission energy model in Stage 6 with hover, climb, cruise phases')
sendPrompt('How is battery selected in Stage 7 from energy and voltage requirements?')
sendPrompt('What does Stage 8 assemble in SelectionResult?')
sendPrompt('How does Stage 9 optimizer grid sweep work across 96 combinations?')
sendPrompt('What does Stage 10 display in the results panel?')
